name: Podcast Dub — RU → EN karaoke shorts
description: Reference template for dubbing Russian podcast-style shorts into English while preserving the existing Russian edit (motion, captions placement, title-banner style). User supplies two inputs per short: (1) a raw Russian source video of the speaker, (2) the already-edited Russian short that defines the edit style to mirror. The chat runs ElevenLabs Dubbing + STT, converts the English word-timestamp transcript into @remotion/captions format, and composes the final English short in Remotion with a matching title banner + karaoke word-highlight captions synced to the dubbed audio.

stackSummary.dubbing: ElevenLabs /v1/dubbing (source_lang: ru, target_lang: en, preserve speaker voice via voice cloning). Returns dubbed audio (mp4/mp3).
stackSummary.transcript: ElevenLabs STT /v1/speech-to-text on the dubbed English audio → word-level timestamps. Alternative: use the transcript returned by the dubbing job if available.
stackSummary.captionsFormat: @remotion/captions Caption[] — { text, startMs, endMs, timestampMs, confidence }
stackSummary.composition: Remotion 4.0.441 — OffthreadVideo (muted) + Audio (dubbed) + Title Banner (first ~3.5s) + Karaoke Line (3 words, active word highlighted)

perShort.rawRussianVideo: mp4 of the speaker talking Russian, no edit — used as the visual track (muted in composition)
perShort.editedRussianReference: mp4 of the already-edited Russian short — used by the chat to derive the title banner text, the title positioning, caption style, and any motion cues to mirror. Not rendered.
perShort.titleOverride: optional English title text (2 short lines) — if omitted, the chat writes one from the reference short's Russian title

doNotCopyLiterally: Exact title text, exact caption positioning (if the reference edit uses different placement), color palette. All should be read off the editedRussianReference per project.
